payload.summary: Deployment automation is wired through .github/workflows/deploy.yml and publishes the static site with make build-export.
payload.implementationStatus: The workflow exports with GITHUB_PAGES_BASE_PATH set for Pages deployment and should be treated as the current deploy path rather than missing automation.

payload.summary: Loopback planning should reference .github/workflows/deploy.yml as the active deployment path.
payload.implementationStatus: Deployment automation is already wired; remaining closure is convergence and validator follow-up instead of adding a missing deploy workflow.
